name: AttributeCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Attribute Commands' command group — 21 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: CreateAttributeFolders
methods.summary: Creates attribute folders. To create a folder, its full path has to be provided. The command will create all folders along the path, if they do not exist.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: DeleteAttributeFolders
methods.summary: Deletes attribute folders and all the deletable attributes and folders it contains. To delete a folder, its identifier has to be provided.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: DeleteAttributes
methods.summary: Deletes attributes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: GetActivePenTables
methods.summary: Returns the model view and layout book pen table identifiers.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: modelViewPenTableId, layoutBookPenTableId.

methods.name: GetAttributeFolderStructure
methods.summary: Returns the detailed folder structure for the attributes of a given type. If the path is not given, the root folder will be returned

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeFolder.

methods.name: GetAttributeFolders
methods.summary: Returns the detailed attribute folders identified by their Ids.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeFolders.

methods.name: GetAttributesByType
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every attribute of the given type.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: GetAttributesIndices
methods.summary: Returns the requested indices and guids of attributes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIndicesAndGuids.

methods.name: GetBuildingMaterialAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed building material attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetCompositeAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed composite attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetFillAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed fill attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetLayerAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed layer attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetLayerCombinationAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed layer combination attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetLineAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed line attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetPenTableAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed pen table attributes (including their pens) identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetProfileAttributePreview
methods.signature: GetProfileAttributePreview(attributeIds: AttributeIds, imageWidth: integer, imageHeight: integer, backgroundColor?: RGBColor): object
methods.summary: Returns the preview image of each requested profile attribute in a base64 string format.

params.name: imageWidth
params.doc: The width of the preview image.

params.name: imageHeight
params.doc: The height of the preview image.

params.name: backgroundColor
params.doc: The background color of the preview image.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: previewImages.

methods.name: GetProfileAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed profile attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetSurfaceAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed surface attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: GetZoneCategoryAttributes
methods.summary: Returns the detailed zone category attributes identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributes.

methods.name: MoveAttributesAndFolders
methods.signature: MoveAttributesAndFolders(attributeFolderIds: AttributeFolderIds, attributeIds: AttributeIds, targetFolderId: AttributeFolderId): object
methods.summary: Moves attributes and attribute folders.

returns.doc: Empty result object.

methods.name: RenameAttributeFolders
methods.summary: Rename attribute folder.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.
